Description
com.airtribe.meditrack.service

    Description

    Create a bill for an appointment with a specific billing strategy.
    Bill

    Create a bill with consultation fee only (default strategy).
    boolean
    AppointmentService.markAppointmentCompleted(String appointmentId)
